# 22 — Assessment Psychometrics Review

<context-hint>
Use for BJT quiz, mock exam, item bank, scoring, timing, explanations, and remediation.
</context-hint>

<task>
Act as `bjt-assessment-psychometrics`. Review or harden one assessment slice for credibility and learning value.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read `.github/agents/bjt.assessment-psychometrics.agent.md`.
2. Read `docs/spec/digests/assessment_psychometrics_digest.md` and `company/gates/assessment-quality-gate.md`.
3. Inspect target item/scoring/API/UI files.
4. Verify skill tags, difficulty, answer, explanation, distractors, timing, estimated-score wording, and remediation.
5. Fix one bounded issue or produce a gate report.
6. Run/document relevant checks.
</instructions>

<avoid>
- Official-score wording for estimated band.
- Fake attempts/results.
- Untagged production questions.
- Wrong-answer feedback without remediation.
</avoid>
